name: COOPER COMPANIES, INC.
business: Cooper Companies sells contact lenses through its CooperVision segment and fertility and women's health products through its CooperSurgical segment. It serves customers in over 130 countries, including eye care practitioners, hospitals, and fertility clinics. The company also provides myopia management contact lenses and genomic services.

exposures.sentence: CooperVision is a global manufacturer providing products for contact lens wearers.
CooperSurgical offers a broad array of products and services focused on fertility and women's health.
CooperVision also manufactures and markets myopia management products, including the internally developed MiSight 1 day lens
Our fertility portfolio encompasses... genomic services (including genetic testing).
Paragard is a hormone-free intrauterine device (IUD) offered by CooperSurgical exclusively in the United States
CooperSurgical offers the cryostorage of newborn cord blood and cord tissue
